org_info.name: RS Education & Solution
org_info.description: RS Education & Solution is a premier educational consultancy dedicated to empowering students through personalized career guidance and admission support.
org_info.mission: To provide every student with the right path to success by bridging the gap between their dreams and top-tier educational institutions.
success_stories: Helped 500+ students secure 100% scholarships in 2023 alone.
Successfully placed students in top NITs and Government Medical Colleges.
Enabled working professionals to complete their degrees through flexible online programs.

services: Admission counselling in Govt & Private universities
Direct admission in regular & online courses
Test series for CBSE & State boards

faqs.question: What services do you provide?
faqs.answer: We provide career counselling, admission assistance in Govt & Private universities, scholarships (up to 100%), direct admissions, exam guidance (IIT/NEET), and support for NIOS/DU SOL/IGNOU.

faqs.question: Hi
faqs.answer: Hi! I’m Riddhi from RS Education & Solution 😊 How can I help you today?

faqs.question: Hello
faqs.answer: Hello! I’m Riddhi from RS Education & Solution. Are you looking for admission guidance or career counselling?

faqs.question: How are you?
faqs.answer: I'm doing great, thank you for asking! I'm ready to help you find the perfect college or course. What are you interested in?

faqs.question: Do you provide direct admission?
faqs.answer: Yes, we facilitate direct admission in various regular and online courses across our partner universities.

faqs.question: Is counselling free?
faqs.answer: Initial career guidance and basic counselling are free of charge. For personalized admission processing, please contact us at +91 7982131324.

faqs.question: Do you help with scholarships?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We assist students in applying for scholarships that can cover up to 100% of their tuition fees.

faqs.question: Where are you located?
faqs.answer: Our main office is located in Faridabad, Haryana. We serve students across Delhi, NCR, and beyond.

faqs.question: What is RS Education & Solution?
faqs.answer: We are a trusted educational consultancy with over 12 years of experience help students navigate their academic and career paths.

faqs.question: Who is the founder of RS Education?
faqs.answer: The organization was founded by Sunil Sharma in 2014.

faqs.question: How many years of experience does RS Education have?
faqs.answer: We have over 12 years of experience in the educational consultancy field.

faqs.question: Can you help with IIT-JEE preparation?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide specialized guidance and resources for students preparing for IIT-JEE and NEET exams.

faqs.question: Do you provide support for NIOS students?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide complete support for NIOS (National Institute of Open Schooling) admissions and assignments.

faqs.question: What about IGNOU admissions?
faqs.answer: We assist with the entire admission process for IGNOU courses.

faqs.question: Do you help with DU SOL admissions?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide guidance and admission support for Delhi University School of Open Learning (DU SOL).

faqs.question: Can I get help with Govt job preparation?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer counselling and resources for various government job examinations.

faqs.question: Do you provide books and assignments?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide curated books, study materials, and assignments for various courses and boards.

faqs.question: Is admission guidance provided for private universities?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have a network of over 200+ top private universities and colleges for admissions.

faqs.question: Can I get a scholarship for MBA?
faqs.answer: Yes, scholarship opportunities are available for MBA and many other professional courses based on merit and eligibility.

faqs.question: Do you help with BCA admissions?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide full support for BCA admissions in reputable colleges in NCR and Haryana.

faqs.question: What is the contact number?
faqs.answer: You can reach us at +91 7982131324 or email rsedusolution09@gmail.com.

faqs.question: Do you provide test series for CBSE?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer comprehensive test series for both CBSE and State Board examinations.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in regular courses through you?
faqs.answer: Yes, we handle admissions for both regular and online degree programs.

faqs.question: Do you offer career counselling for 10th class students?
faqs.answer: Yes, we help students choose the right stream and path after their secondary education.

faqs.question: Can I apply for online courses?
faqs.answer: Yes, we facilitate admissions for various online and distance learning programs.

faqs.question: Do you help with state board exams?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide guidance and test series for all major state boards.

faqs.question: How can I book an appointment?
faqs.answer: You can call us directly or visit our office in Faridabad to schedule a session.

faqs.question: Do you assist with admission docs?
faqs.answer: Yes, our team guides you through the entire documentation and application process.

faqs.question: Is there any support for BBOS?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide support for the Bihar Board of Open Schooling (BBOS) as well.

faqs.question: Can you suggest colleges for B.Tech?
faqs.answer: Certainly! We can recommend top B.Tech colleges in Delhi, Haryana, and UP based on your budget and rank.

faqs.question: Do you provide guidance for medical entrance?
faqs.answer: Yes, we specialize in NEET preparation guidance and medical college admissions.

faqs.question: Are there scholarships for students from outside Haryana?
faqs.answer: Yes, we help students from all over India find suitable scholarship programs.

faqs.question: What are your office timings?
faqs.answer: Typically, we are available from 10 AM to 6 PM, Monday to Saturday.

faqs.question: How many universities are in your network?
faqs.answer: We have strong tie-ups with over 200+ universities and colleges nationwide.

faqs.question: Can I get help with PhD admissions?
faqs.answer: Yes, we do provide counselling for higher research and PhD admissions.

faqs.question: Is there any age limit for your services?
faqs.answer: No, we help learners of all ages pursuing any level of education.

faqs.question: Do you charge for college information?
faqs.answer: General information about colleges is part of our free counselling service.

faqs.question: Can you help with vocational courses?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer guidance for various vocational and skill-development courses.

faqs.question: How do I know if I qualify for a 100% scholarship?
faqs.answer: Eligibility depends on academic performance and specific institution criteria. Talk to us for a personalized assessment.

faqs.question: Do you have Tie-ups in UP?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have a vast network of colleges in Noida, Ghaziabad, and other parts of Uttar Pradesh.

faqs.question: Can I visit your office in Faridabad?
faqs.answer: Yes, you are always welcome to our office for a face-to-face consultation.

faqs.question: Do you help with law admissions?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide guidance for LLB and LLM courses in various private and govt universities.

faqs.question: What is the role of Riddhi?
faqs.answer: I am Riddhi, your professional student counsellor from RS Education! I'm here to help you navigate your academic journey.

faqs.question: Can Riddhi help with course selection?
faqs.answer: Yes! I can help you find a course that matches your interests and career goals.

faqs.question: Is RS Education & Solution reliable?
faqs.answer: With over 12 years of experience and thousands of successful students, we are one of the most trusted consultancies in Haryana.

faqs.question: Do you help with B.Ed admissions?
faqs.answer: Yes, B.Ed is one of our specialty areas for admission counselling.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in Delhi University through you?
faqs.answer: We primarily assist with DU SOL admissions. For regular DU courses, we provide guidance on the CUET process.

faqs.question: Do you offer guidance for management exams?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide help for CAT, MAT, and other management entrance exams.

faqs.question: How much time does the admission process take?
faqs.answer: It varies by course and university, but we ensure the fastest possible processing for our students.

faqs.question: Do you help with hostel facilities?
faqs.answer: Yes, we assist students in finding appropriate accommodation near their chosen campus.

faqs.question: Can I get a discount on fee?
faqs.answer: Through our scholarship programs and tie-ups, we often help students secure the most competitive fee structures.

faqs.question: Do you provide consultancy for distance learning?
faqs.answer: Yes, we are experts in distance and online learning admissions via IGNOU, DU SOL, and more.

faqs.question: Why should I choose RS Education?
faqs.answer: We offer expert-led guidance, a 200+ university network, scholarship assistance, and 12+ years of proven success.

faqs.question: Can I contact Sunil Sharma directly?
faqs.answer: Sunil Sharma is our founder and leads the expert counselling team. You can connect with our team to schedule time with him.
